species: Mice with myocardial and mitochondrial CaMKII overexpression (mtCaMKII) have severe dilated cardiomyopathy
tissue: myocardial infarction is a major cause of heart failure...
cell_type: Cardiac myocytes isolated from mtCaMKII mice showed flag-CaMKII localized primarily with a mitochondrial marker...
disease_state: The mtCaMKII mice developed dilated cardiomyopathy with reduced left ventricular ejection fraction...
sample_source: We found an increase in auto-phosphorylated CaMKII in mitochondria isolated from heart tissue...
age: Mice used in these studies were a mixture of male and female animals 7–20 weeks of age...
sex: Mice used in these studies were a mixture of male and female animals...
strain: Nnt is mutated in the C57BL/6J strain we used...
